delta_range.reason: Delta bucket <0.25 has worst win rate (3%, n=4602). Review delta_good_min / delta_good_max in config.

expiry_window.reason: DTE range 7-14d has the lowest win rate (3%). Review expiry_good_min / expiry_good_max in config.

max_iv_fn.reason: IV hard filter has 67% false-negative rate (11074/16509 rejected high-IV options were profitable). Consider relaxing max_iv slightly.

strike.reason: Strike contributes avg 2.24 on profitable trades vs 1.33 on losses (diff=0.91, source=graded) — strong predictor. Raising weight 0.75 → 1.46. (graded outcomes only — insufficient efficacy data)

iv.reason: Iv contributes avg 0.66 on profitable trades vs 0.64 on losses (diff=0.02, source=efficacy) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 1.15 → 0.75 to reduce noise. (efficacy only — insufficient graded data)

volatility.reason: Volatility contributes avg 0.87 on profitable trades vs 0.08 on losses (diff=0.78, source=efficacy) — strong predictor. Raising weight 0.7 → 1.39. (efficacy only — insufficient graded data)

notes: Factor weight analysis found 3 factor(s) with suggested weight changes.
Market regime (VIX): win rates similar across regimes — high (>25): 12% (n=15816), mid (15-25): 10% (n=28795). No material VIX regime effect detected.
Market regime (sector ETF 5d momentum): win rates similar — leading (>+2%): 10% (n=38105), neutral (±2%): 14% (n=6434). No material sector momentum regime effect detected.
